ogTitle: Barcaldine Downs vs Bardon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barcaldine Downs and Bardon.
heading: Barcaldine Downs vs Bardon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barcaldine Downs, Queensland and Bardon, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barcaldine Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Bardon (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barcaldine Downs or Bardon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barcaldine Downs has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Bardon scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barcaldine Downs scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Bardon scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barcaldine Downs or Bardon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barcaldine Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
